events.description: Habitat Safari | June 8–12, 2026 Ages 5-6 Habitat Safari takes young explorers on a journey through various natural habitats. events.title: Celebrities About Town: A Memoir Book Club with Garland Public Libraries!
events.description: 📚 Garland Public Library Book Club at Lakewood Brewing 📅 Thursday, June 11th 🕡 6:30 PM Books, brews, and the best company—what more could you ask for? Join the amazing librarians from the Garland Public Library right here at Lakewood Brewing as they lead the next round of the Book Club Series. This month’s pick is Connie: A Memoir by Connie Chung 🍺 Grab

events.title: Pollinator Plant Sale
events.description: ONE-DAY POLLINATOR PLANT SALE! Join us at Texas Discovery Gardens on Saturday, June 13 , from 9 a.m. – 1 p.m. for our pollinator one-day plant sale! We’ll have full availability of beautiful plants, including: Native plants Perennials Herbs Colorful annuals Come sip and shop while you browse. Beverages will be available! events.title: Social Running Club
events.description: The monthly social runs are hosted on the second Saturday of each month and will keep you in beer belly shape for the Velvet Hammer 5k. The taproom is OPEN! Check in is between the hours of 8-9 AM. You can start your run/walk whenever you would like, or join the group start at 8:30 AM. The rolling start allows you a choice, flexibility to go at your pace, bu

events.title: Plant Bingo
events.description: Plant Bingo is a social game where guests play classic bingo over several relaxed rounds and win plants as prizes while enjoying drinks, food, and good company. We provide everything, you just show up and play. Open to all ages. -10+ Prize plants per event. -No losers at plant bingo, everyone goes home with a plant. -Everyone gets one bingo card. Additional

events.title: Bug Squad Adventures: Summer Camp, Ages 7-9
events.description: Bug Squad Adventures | June 15–19, 2026 Ages 7-9 Bug Squad Adventures combines STEAM activities with hands-on insect exploration. Campers learn about bugs and ecosystems through live insect encounters, outdoor bug hunts, and problem-solving challenges. Teamwork, curiosity, and creativity are encouraged throughout the week. Please see our Summer Camp Sessions

events.title: Trivia Night
events.description: Free to play! Prizes for 1st, 2nd, and 3rd place. Hosted by Dallas Trivia Guy on the first and third Thursdays of the month.

events.title: Father’s Day Beer & Rib Pairing
events.description: Bring Dad or your favorite Dude to TUPPS for a treat from the Grain Room Kitchen on Sunday, June 21, between 11:00 AM-8:00 PM. events.title: Habitat Guardians: Summer Camp, Ages 10-12
events.description: Habitat Guardians | June 22–26, 2026 Ages 10-12 Habitat Guardians empowers campers to think about wildlife and the habitats they depend on. Through hands-on activities, campers explore how human actions affect wildlife and how individuals and communities can help protect ecosystems. events.title: Stars, Stripes, & Sips: Fireworks at TUPPS
events.description: Bring the whole crew and come party with us to kick off 4th of July Weekend! events.title: Fort Worth's Fourth
events.description: Fort Worth's largest Fourth of July celebration: festival food, cold drinks, kids' activities, live music, and fireworks along the Trinity River at Panther Island Pavilion. Gates open 5:00pm, fireworks at 9:30pm.
